ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight 1234 from New York to Los Angeles
ham.body:
Dear Jane Doe,

Thank you for booking with SkyHigh Airlines. Below are the details for your upcoming flight:

• Flight Number: 1234
• Departure: New York (JFK) – 10:00 AM, 15 May 2026
• Arrival: Los Angeles (LAX) – 1:30 PM, 15 May 2026
• Seat: 12A (Aisle)
• Gate: 22B
• Check‑in: 2 hours before departure, available online at <URL> or at the airport kiosk.

Please bring a valid government photo ID and a printed copy of this confirmation. If you need to change your seat, cancel, or add a meal, use the link below:

<URL>

Thank you for choosing SkyHigh Airlines. We look forward to serving you.

Best regards,
SkyHigh Airlines Customer Service
Email: support@skyhigh.com
Phone: 1‑800‑555‑1234

spam.subject: Urgent: FedEx Delivery Fee Due – Action Required
spam.body:
Hello,

Our records show that your recent shipment with FedEx (Tracking # 987654321) was missed due to an unpaid delivery fee. To avoid further delays and additional charges, please confirm your account information and submit the fee within 48 hours.

You can review the fee details and pay securely by clicking the link below:

<URL>

If you have already settled this fee, please ignore this notice. Otherwise, failure to pay may result in the return of the package to sender.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Support
Phone: 1‑800‑345‑1234
